questionHtml:
Which indicator is appropriate for the acid-base titration shown below?

A. Thymol blue (pKa = 1.5)
B. Methyl orange (pKa = 3.7)
C. Bromophenol blue (pKa = 4.2)
D. Phenolphthalein (pKa = 9.6)
